Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall for Trustee.

Ms. Hall stated that the accounting was e-filed yesterday. Status on filing of the second account is continued to October 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Continued To Sep-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney to appear on September 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the second account has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Trustee

Ms. Hall stated that she received the statement from her client the day before yesterday, that they are preparing the accounting, and requested a 60 day continuance. The Court noted it generally continues these matters for 30 days, but will allow 60 days for Ms. Hall to ensure that it will be done. The Second Accounting is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Future Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Future Accounting
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for and with (trustee) Jason Ramil.

The Court stated that the trustee is present and the Order to Appear will go off calendar and asked Ms. Hall for clarification on who she represents (William or Jason Ramil). Ms. Hall clarified that she represented William Ramil in the establishment of the special needs trust and that his matter is now complete, that Jason Ramil has now retained her and has provided her with the information to do the accounting and that the accounting can be completed and filed in 6 weeks. The Court asked for confirmation that William Ramil, Guardian ad Litem has no further role. Ms. Hall stated that William Ramil settled the litigation matter, that the money was funded into the special needs trust and that he is no longer involved. The status on filing an accounting was continued to June 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Future Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Continued To May-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for William Ramil.

Ms. Hall clarified that she is not the attorney of record on this case and that her capacity is Guardian ad Litem. The Court asked if she has been in communication with the trustee. Ms. Hall stated that she filed a declaration yesterday, that she worked with the trustee to get the trust set up, that they have had many communications, that she has suggested he obtain counsel and her firm has offered their services, that he requested an agreement from them but has not responded since and that she has written to him regarding the need of an accounting. The Court stated that it will continue the matter and issue an Order to Appear to the trustee requiring that a petition to approve an accounting be on file or to appear on May 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status on filing an accounting was continued to the same date. Ms. Hall asked if she needed to be present at the next hearing. The Court stated that while the Order to Appear will also be sent to her it is not directed to her but that to the extant that she could assist in this matter would be appreciated.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
